nasb.text: Now the Lord spoke to Moses after the death of the two sons of Aaron, when they had approached the presence of the Lord and died.

esv.text: The Lord spoke to Moses after the death of the two sons of Aaron, when they drew near before the Lord and died,

cnv.text: 亞倫的兩個兒子走近耶和華面前而死亡以後，耶和華對摩西說：

ccb.text: 亚伦的两个儿子死在耶和华面前以后，
